case_title: KEYES ELLIS et al VS VALENCIA AUTO SERVICE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,100.00 FILED BY KEYES ELLIS BEST INSTRUMENT REPAIR CO. AS TO DEFENDANT VALENCIA AUTO SERVICE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-26-1993 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 01
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT VALENCIA AUTO SERVICE
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION APR-26-1993, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAY-14-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KEYES ELLIS BEST INSTRUMENT REPAIR CO. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT VALENCIA AUTO SERVICE PLTF. FAILED SUSTAIN HIS BURDEN, BY THE PREPONDENC OF THE EVIDENCE, THAT THE PLTF WAS NEGLIGENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
